data.task_objective: Develop email template generator for interview invitations and follow-up communications
data.context: No completed previous tasks context available.
data.result:
```python
def generate_interview_invitation_email(candidate_name, job_title, interview_date, interview_time, interview_location, interviewer_name, interviewer_title, contact_email, additional_instructions=None):
    """
    Generates an email invitation for an interview.

    Args:
        candidate_name (str): The name of the candidate.
        job_title (str): The title of the job the candidate is interviewing for.
        interview_date (str): The date of the interview (e.g., "October 26, 2023").
        interview_time (str): The time of the interview (e.g., "10:00 AM - 11:00 AM").
        interview_location (str): The location of the interview (e.g., "Zoom Meeting - Link: [Zoom Link]" or "123 Main Street, Anytown, USA").
        interviewer_name (str): The name of the interviewer.
        interviewer_title (str): The title of the interviewer.
        contact_email (str):  The email address for the candidate to contact with questions.
        additional_instructions (str, optional): Any additional instructions for the candidate. Defaults to None.

    Returns:
        str: The complete email message.
    """

    subject = f"Interview Invitation: {job_title} at [Company Name]" # Replace [Company Name]
    body = f"""Dear {candidate_name},

Thank you for your interest in the {job_title} position at [Company Name].

We are pleased to invite you to an interview to further discuss your qualifications.

Here are the details of your interview:

*   **Date:** {interview_date}
*   **Time:** {interview_time}
*   **Location:** {interview_location}

You will be interviewing with {interviewer_name}, {interviewer_title}.

Please come prepared to discuss your experience and skills related to the {job_title} position.

{f'Additional Instructions: {additional_instructions}\n\n' if additional_instructions else ''}

If you have any questions or need to reschedule, please do not hesitate to contact us at {contact_email}.

We look forward to meeting you!

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
""" # Replace [Company Name], [Your Name], [Your Title]
    return f"Subject: {subject}\n\n{body}"


def generate_interview_followup_email(candidate_name, job_title, interviewer_name, contact_email, feedback_deadline=None):
    """
    Generates a follow-up email to a candidate after an interview.

    Args:
        candidate_name (str): The name of the candidate.
        job_title (str): The title of the job the candidate interviewed for.
        interviewer_name (str): The name of the interviewer.
        contact_email (str):  The email address for the candidate to contact with questions.
        feedback_deadline (str, optional): The deadline by which the candidate should expect feedback. Defaults to None.

    Returns:
        str: The complete email message.
    """

    subject = f"Following Up: {job_title} Interview at [Company Name]" # Replace [Company Name]
    body = f"""Dear {candidate_name},

Thank you for taking the time to interview with {interviewer_name} for the {job_title} position at [Company Name]. We appreciate you sharing your experience and qualifications with us.

We are currently reviewing all applications and will be in touch with an update on the status of your application.

{f'You can expect to hear from us by {feedback_deadline}.\n\n' if feedback_deadline else ''}

In the meantime, if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us at {contact_email}.

Thank you again for your interest in [Company Name].

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
""" # Replace [Company Name], [Your Name], [Your Title]
    return f"Subject: {subject}\n\n{body}"


if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage: Invitation Email
    invitation_email = generate_interview_invitation_email(
        candidate_name="Jane Doe",
        job_title="Software Engineer",
        interview_date="November 2, 2023",
        interview_time="2:00 PM - 3:00 PM",
        interview_location="Zoom Meeting - Link: [Zoom Meeting Link]",
        interviewer_name="John Smith",
        interviewer_title="Engineering Manager",
        contact_email="recruiting@example.com",
        additional_instructions="Please bring a copy of your portfolio."
    )
    print("--- Interview Invitation Email ---")
    print(invitation_email)

    # Example Usage: Follow-up Email
    followup_email = generate_interview_followup_email(
        candidate_name="Jane Doe",
        job_title="Software Engineer",
        interviewer_name="John Smith",
        contact_email="recruiting@example.com",
        feedback_deadline="November 9, 2023"
    )
    print("\n--- Interview Follow-up Email ---")
    print(followup_email)
```
